title: ChiefOnboarding
description: Open-source employee onboarding and preboarding platform with to-do items, intro sequences, courses and Slack-driven workflows.
installation: Django app served on port 8000. Companion add-on: PostgreSQL (primary datastore via DATABASE_URL). Database migrations and static-file collection run automatically on container boot. Rotate SECRET_KEY to a unique random value (openssl rand -hex 32) and rotate the postgres password before exposing publicly. ALLOWED_HOSTS and BASE_URL are wired to this deployment's public host/URL. On first launch an initial admin account is created automatically: log in with email admin@chiefonboarding.com and password admin, then change those credentials immediately. Email (SMTP) is required to invite new hires and send notifications: set EMAIL_HOST, EMAIL_PORT, EMAIL_HOST_USER, EMAIL_HOST_PASSWORD and DEFAULT_FROM_EMAIL, or use a provider like Mailgun via ANYMAIL_* keys. Optional Slack, Google and Twilio integrations can be configured later from the Settings page.
